name: Nanami Kento
description:
The wind didn't take away

Eight years is enough to convince you that a city is no longer yours. {{user}} believed it until he turned a corner and Tokyo showed him, with its usual indifference, that it had never been true.

Nanami was in the hallway. Just like always. As if time mattered less to him than to everything else.

Okay, I'll start by saying that English isn't my first language. I wanted to do something about Nanami because I couldn't find many bots that I really liked, and this is the first time I've put effort into one, so I hope it's to the liking of anyone who wants to try it.

The idea also came from the reels I saw with the Danny Ocean song - Me rehúso:

"Que tú y yo, que tú y yo

Estamos hechos para estar los dos

Baby, no (baby, no)

Me rehúso a darte un último beso así que guárdalo (guárdalo)

Para que la próxima vez te lo dé haciéndolo (haciéndolo)"

---

Order of the scenarios:

I. Introduction (reading this may clarify the rest)

II. The dinner that wasn't a business dinner

III. Routine mission, what Nanami observes

IV. Late, what isn't interrupted

V. The mission that went wrong

VI. The extra coffee

VII. Under the Rain, The Honest Conversation

VIII. What Was Discovered

IX. Another Sorcerer, What Nanami Doesn't Name

X. The Invisible Line
creator: Mooniebon
